profile.name: Your Name
profile.title: Software Developer and Mechanical Design Builder
profile.tagline: I build practical software and CAD projects with clear outcomes.

codingProjects.title: Vista Notes
codingProjects.shortDescription: A desktop-like note app with keyboard-first workflows.
codingProjects.fullDescription: Built a web note app inspired by native desktop interactions, with autosave and offline caching.
codingProjects.problem: Users needed a fast notes tool that still works offline.
codingProjects.solution: Implemented local persistence, indexed search, and resilient autosave.
codingProjects.aiSummary: A React and TypeScript note app focused on speed, offline usage, and keyboard interactions.

codingProjects.title: Robot Ops Dashboard
codingProjects.shortDescription: Monitoring dashboard for robotics test runs and telemetry.
codingProjects.fullDescription: Created a dashboard to monitor robot sensors, run sessions, and alert operators when metrics drift.
codingProjects.problem: Test teams lacked a single view for telemetry and failure events.
codingProjects.solution: Delivered real-time charts, event timelines, and exportable reports.
codingProjects.aiSummary: A Python-based telemetry dashboard that helps teams analyze robotics test runs quickly.

codingProjects.title: Storefront Redesign
codingProjects.shortDescription: Responsive ecommerce frontend with improved conversion flow.
codingProjects.fullDescription: Redesigned product listing and checkout interactions to reduce friction on mobile.
codingProjects.problem: Checkout completion rates were low on small devices.
codingProjects.solution: Simplified forms, improved hierarchy, and optimized loading.
codingProjects.aiSummary: A mobile-focused frontend redesign for ecommerce, centered on conversion and speed.

codingProjects.title: Course Scheduler
codingProjects.shortDescription: Constraint-based class planner with conflict detection.
codingProjects.fullDescription: Built a planner that checks conflicts and proposes valid schedules based on user priorities.
codingProjects.problem: Students needed a clearer way to compare schedule options.
codingProjects.solution: Implemented conflict scoring and quick scenario switching.
codingProjects.aiSummary: A planning app that generates and evaluates conflict-free student schedules.

solidworksProjects.title: Robot Gripper Assembly
solidworksProjects.shortDescription: Parametric gripper with modular finger designs.
solidworksProjects.fullDescription: Designed a gripper assembly for adaptable object handling with configurable finger geometry.
solidworksProjects.problem: Needed one gripper platform that could handle multiple object sizes.
solidworksProjects.solution: Built a modular assembly with quick-swappable finger variants.
solidworksProjects.aiSummary: A modular SolidWorks gripper assembly with parametric components for varied objects.

solidworksProjects.title: Compact Gearbox Housing
solidworksProjects.shortDescription: Lightweight gearbox shell optimized for manufacturability.
solidworksProjects.fullDescription: Modeled and iterated on a compact housing with mounting points and thermal considerations.
solidworksProjects.problem: Existing housing design was heavy and difficult to machine.
solidworksProjects.solution: Reduced part complexity and improved mounting access.
solidworksProjects.aiSummary: A manufacturable gearbox housing redesign that balances stiffness and weight.

solidworksProjects.title: Desk Clamp Tool
solidworksProjects.shortDescription: Quick-release clamp concept for prototyping benches.
solidworksProjects.fullDescription: Created an ergonomic quick-release clamp intended for repeated use in prototyping workflows.
solidworksProjects.problem: Bench fixtures were slow to reposition and uncomfortable to tighten.
solidworksProjects.solution: Designed a lever-driven quick-release mechanism with ergonomic grip geometry.
solidworksProjects.aiSummary: A quick-release clamp mechanism focused on ergonomics and repeat use.
